My boyfriend and I went for tea this afternoon and received excellent service from the staff. They were all very friendly despite being busy, and the food was delicious. We'll be back soon!

reviews.comment:
Llegamos a las 14:45 e inmediatamente te comenzó un ruido molesto tipo chicharra. Nunca paró y nadie se dignó a frenarlo a pesar de la queja de varios de los presentes. Hace exactamente una hora. Un desastre eso y la atención de los empleados.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived at 2:45 PM and immediately an annoying buzzing noise started. It never stopped, and no one bothered to turn it off despite complaints from several people. It's been exactly an hour. That and the staff's service were a disaster.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Jorge, Lamentamos mucho lo sucedido, el inconveniente de ese día fue resuelto.
Tu comentario nos ayuda a seguir mejorando.
Esperamos que vuelvas pronto por la estación.

Saludos!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/651290643148390126/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toNFpXazNOa1JyYTNocFQyVndOa3hwTVRSM1QxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Insoportable estar comiendo adentro. Un ruido fuerte e intenso de una máquina continuamente. Se quejaron varias personas pero nada.

(Translated by Google)
It's unbearable eating inside. There's a constant, loud, and intense noise from a machine. Several people complained, but nothing was done.

reviewReply.comment:

reviews.comment:
Hace poco ha cambiado la consecion y ha bajado el nivel de atencion, faltan frecuentemente productos en  el local full, en ocasiones no funcionan las aplicaciones para descuentos. Esperemos que esto sea solo transitorio por que son nuevos

(Translated by Google)
The concession recently changed, and the level of service has dropped. Products are frequently out of stock at the full-service store, and sometimes the discount apps don't work. Let's hope this is just temporary since they're new.

reviewReply.comment: Julian, Muchas gracias por tu reseña y comentario. Te esperamos pronto, saludos
